notes: Three crude horizontal blob outlines that fail to capture the four-squid pile, the arms/tentacles, the head-mantle separation, or the eye placement of the input photo.
specific_issues: wrong number of squid bodies (3 vs 4 in photo)
squid oriented horizontally rather than the diagonal pile in the photo
no arms or tentacles drawn at all
no funnel or distinct head separation from mantle
eyes reduced to tiny dots, mispositioned and not almond-shaped
fins not articulated as distinct shapes
stipple is sparse but randomly placed, not following the chromatophore fields visible on the photo's mantles
silhouettes are generic loaf-shaped outlines, not traced from the photo's actual contours
missing the dangling arm clusters on the right side of the photo
reads as a procedural template rather than a render of this specific photo
